issues.message: Expected at least 2 code_input project exercise(s), but the draft has 1.
Exercise policy targets 2 "fill_blank_choice" exercise(s), but the draft has 4.
Exercise policy expects 3 "code_input" exercise(s), but the draft has 1.
Exercise policy expects "code_input" to be dominant, but the draft is dominated by "fill_blank_choice".
